text: Eating junk or unhealthy foods coupled with low physical activity is considered as a main contributor. Complex behavioral and psychological factors influence the eating patterns. In addition, metabolic errors in energy utilization may favor fat accumulation. Insulin is an important modifier of energy and fat metabolism favoring fat deposition. Low and high birth weight Since, growth spurt in boys and girls occurs in different age groups, age and gender specific BMI centiles of reference population is used to th assess their nutritional status.
